name: Flying Grimace
description: Flying Grimace is a fun shooting game for all. To play this game, you need to be great at aiming. The game is set in colorful environments, and your aim is to destroy as many Grimaces as possible. Remember, you have limited bullets. Flying Grimace will surely test your aiming skills and keep you engaged for hours. This game is perfect for fans of arcade shooting games and anyone who loves a good challenge.
instructions: PC You can use ASDW or the right-left and up-down arrow keys to fix your target And space key to shoot Mobile Use the joystick to fix your target and tap on the shoot button to shoot
tags: Fun, Funny, Grimace, Grimace Shake, Highscore, NapTech Games, Shoot, Shooter, Shooting
